THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUDSON, ROBERT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 380 EDDY STREET #319, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,897.50 RENT, $300.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $107.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,305.00, STAYED UNTIL MAY-01-1995, LEASE FORFEITED, NO FURTHER STAYS. BACK RENT & DAMAGES, ATYNS FEES & COSTS ARE WAIVED IF DFT VACATES BY 5PM 5-1-95. SECURITY DEPOSIT BECOMES PROPERTY OF PLTFF.BOTH SIDES WAIVE CLAIMS EXCEPT THAT PLTF DOES NOT WAIVE CLAIMS AGAINST DEFT FOR ANY DAMAGE TO PREMISES.
